amendments.change: Added grade_thresholds block (A+/A/B/C/D cutoffs at 6/4/2/1 sigma). The cutoffs themselves are ex-ante integer-sigma spacings standard in discovery tables (not data-fitted); this amendment freezes them against further tuning rather than pre-registering them in the strict sense.

A_leave_one_family_out.claim: Phi_M separation survives leaving out any 1 of 9 control families
A_leave_one_family_out.threshold: min d >= 1.5 across all 9 leave-one-out splits

B_meccan_medinan.claim: Meccan AND Medinan each internally exceed control F
B_meccan_medinan.falsifier: either F < 1.0 on clean Band-A data

honest_adjustments_2026_04_18: Test B FALSIFIED on clean data (F_M=0.80, F_D=0.84)
Test A: surah-level 10-fold CV is a DIFFERENT hypothesis (T12/D24).
Test A: leave-one-family-out now in Cell 64b (audit 2026-04-18 v2).

Test A: hadith_bukhari quarantined post-v2 audit (quotes Quran by design as Prophetic tradition), reducing tested pool from 9 to 6 Arabic families. Pre-reg threshold (min d >= 1.5) applied to all 6 actual leave-one-family-out splits; downgrade reported transparently and is NOT a post-hoc selection of easier splits.
Test C CLOSED STRONGER (100% of resamples > 2.0, median 10.0)

grade_thresholds.metric: Mahalanobis distance to Arabic-control centroid (mu, S_inv from ARABIC_CTRL_POOL Band-A)
grade_thresholds.validity: Band A (15 ≤ n_verses ≤ 100). Out-of-band grades are statistical extrapolations and are reported separately.
grade_thresholds.headline: Only Band-A grade distribution is defensible for publication.
grade_thresholds.rationale: Cutoffs chosen ex ante at 1/2/4/6 σ, spaced on the integer-σ grid that is standard in physics-style discovery tables (e.g. CDF/Dzero 5σ Higgs thresholds). No post-hoc optimisation.
